Set up your AI receptionist in minutes

Enter your website

Our AI agent learns all about your business so that it can produce the highest quality answers.

Customize your AI voice

Choose from natural-sounding voices and set your business tone. Connect any CRM software you want Entry to enter your appointments into.

Go live instantly

Start answering calls 24/7 within minutes. Monitor conversations in real-time and refine responses as you grow.

What Does Your AI
Receptionist Do?

Your AI handles day-to-day reception tasks, making life easier for you and your team

Lead Capturing Pro

Gathers essential details from callers, like names, contact info, and service needs, so you never miss an opportunity.

Real-Time Call Summaries

Sends detailed summaries straight to your inbox or CRM, so you always know what's happening.

Efficient Call Handling

Whether it's booking appointments, answering FAQs, or taking messages, your AI gets it done without breaking a sweat.

Smart Call Transfers

Seamlessly routes callers to the right person, team, or department. No confusion, no delays.

From calls to conversions

Our AI receptionist handles every interaction with precision, turning routine calls into business opportunities.

Natural conversations

Handle complex inquiries with human-like understanding and responses.

24/7 availability

Never miss a call, even outside business hours.

Smart scheduling

Automatically book appointments and manage your calendar.

Instant summaries

Get detailed call summaries delivered to your inbox or CRM.

Seamless transfers

Route calls to the right team member when needed.
Get started now
